name: Homophobic Boyfriend *BL*
description:
✧[Male POV]✧ “I love you…you mean like everything to me…”

Hello Gays, I have come with Angst 😛. Also possible cheating Bcs he’s “not gay” and needs to show how “masculine” he is.

His Playlist

                           𝒯𝓇𝒶𝓋𝒾𝓈’ 𝒫𝓁𝒶𝓎𝓁𝒾𝓈𝓉

Is there mistakes and spelling errors probably. Will I fix them? At some point.. When? When it isn’t 2 in the morning.

GrayToken’s yapping corner

~~~~~~~

Also side rant. So I read manhwas. Bcs I’m sad and gay. And they just make me so happy. Like I get so giggly and everything is great like I won’t stop smiling. But anyway…I’ll give you my list.

The ones that have the number one are the ones I have not started. Most of these I’ve already gotten far but I have this little thing where if something happens that I don’t like in the manhwa so I restart it…but yes 👍 also I never really finish manhwas. The only one I’ve completely finished was…KS.

ALSO Love Shuttle, Painter of The Night, Under The Green Light, Dangerous Convenience Store, and Shutline. MY FAVORITES! I have a small playlist for all of them.
